cards.title: Case Taking Framework
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Naturopathic history (presenting complaints, HPC)
  • Past history: Medical, surgical, family
  • Lifestyle assessment: Diet, sleep, stress, exercise
  • Vitality index scoring

cards.title: Yoga Therapy Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hypertension: Savasana, Shavasana, pranayama
  • Diabetes: Ardha Matsyendrasana, Mandukasana
  • Asthma: Bhujangasana, Setu Bandhasana
  • Anxiety: Yoga Nidra, meditation protocols

cards.title: Massage Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Head massage: Brahmi oil, circular strokes
  • Abdomen massage: Clockwise for constipation
  • Full body: 60-min Abhyanga sequence
  • Post-massage care & contraindications

cards.title: Acupressure Points
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • LI 4 (Hegu): Headache, toothache
  • ST 36 (Zusanli): Digestive, immunity
  • PC 6 (Neiguan): Nausea, anxiety
  • SP 6 (Sanyinjiao): Gynaecological

cards.title: Pranayama Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Anulom-Vilom: 5–10 min, ratio 1:2
  • Kapalbhati: 60 strokes/min, 5 min
  • Bhramari: 5–10 rounds for anxiety
  • Sheetali/Sheetkari: Cooling pranayama

cards.title: Diet Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Alkaline diet for acidic conditions
  • Anti-inflammatory: Mediterranean + curcumin
  • Elimination diet: 4-week protocol
  • Fasting guidelines: Fruit fast, juice fast

cards.title: Fasting Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Short fast (24h): Water or fruit juice
  • Medium fast (3–7 days): Juice fasting
  • Refeeding protocol post-fast
  • Contraindications: DM, elderly, pregnancy

cards.title: Lifestyle Disease Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hypertension: DASH diet, yoga, nature walks
  • T2DM: Low GI diet, resistance exercise
  • Obesity: Caloric deficit + yoga + massage
  • Hypothyroidism: Iodine foods, selenium

cards.title: Naturopathic Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Therapeutic order (Tolle causam)
  • Vis medicatrix naturae principles
  • Individualized vs standardized protocols
  • Evidence integration framework

cards.title: Drug Interactions
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Herb–drug interaction red flags
  • St. John's Wort: CYP3A4 inducer
  • Garlic + anticoagulants
  • Supplement–drug interaction table

cards.title: Counselling Skills
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Patient education principles
  • Compliance strategies
  • Shared decision-making
  • Follow-up scheduling framework

cards.title: Contraindications
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Absolute contraindications by therapy
  • Relative contraindications
  • Red flags requiring referral
  • Medico-legal documentation
